dict.string: GoSteady uses the camera for exercise form analysis, body composition photos, and food recognition.
GoSteady needs access to your health data to track workouts, heart rate, steps, sleep, and provide personalised fitness insights.
GoSteady saves your workouts and fitness data to Apple Health so you can track your progress across apps.
GoSteady needs background location access to continue tracking your route during workouts when the app is in the background.
GoSteady uses your location to track your running, cycling, and swimming routes in real time.
GoSteady may use the microphone for audio recording during workout sessions.
GoSteady uses motion data to improve workout tracking accuracy and detect activity type.
GoSteady needs access to your photo library to select images for food recognition and body analysis.
